The strategy is based on momentum and volatility indicators to capture trend reversals. It uses the EMA crossover with RSI overbought levels, along with a positive MACD to confirm the bullish trend. ATR-based stop loss and take profit levels are used to manage risk.

The strategy hypothesizes that the momentum of IMXUSDC is predominantly bullish, characterized by periods of high volatility and price movements in favor of the asset. The assumption is that this will lead to a trend reversal when the market returns to its normal range.
